▶️Entry Period: Nov 19th- Dec 18th

#playkoreanfood_season2

transcription.text: Hi guys, I'm Dots. I am really excited because today I'm going to make my first ever cooking video for Play Korea Food Season 2. Let's go! With the popularity of K-pop and K-drama, many Korean food and snacks are available in Singapore. I headed to a Korean supermarket to get the ingredients to make my favorite dish, tteokbokki, a spicy Korean rice cake dish. Noodles, tteokbokki sweet sauce, gochujang, rice cake and of course, some kimchi on the side. Other ingredients that I will be using is minced garlic, onion, leek, cabbage, anchovy broth, mini hot dogs, fish cake, eggs, white sesame seeds and sesame oil. So with many travel and dine-in restrictions during this pandemic, I miss visiting Korea and eating their delicious food. So I was thinking, why not make one of my favorite dish, tteokbokki, a spicy rice cake dish at home. I like the texture of the chewy rice cake and some heat from the gochujang, which is a hot pepper sauce. Don't worry if you can't really eat spicy food because you can choose the level of spiciness when you're buying that hot pepper sauce. I put in some anchovy broth, tteokbokki sweet sauce, gochujang, minced garlic into a pan and mix. Next, I added some rice cake, cabbage, onions and let it cook for five minutes. So not forgetting snacking on kimchi while I wait. So then I added some fish cake, leek, mini hot dogs and eggs to my tteokbokki, not forgetting the noodles. With the 2021 Korean food video contest going on, it's a great chance for anyone who wants to try their hands on cooking some Korean dishes, trying new food or feasting on some Korean food to take part in the contest. With a total prize money of $134,000, you can choose to upload a video or an eating video. The submission period starts from 19th of November to 18th of December. Just post the video you make on YouTube or Instagram. Don't worry if you're not a professional at cooking or filming. You never know until you give it a try. Most importantly, have fun and enjoy the delicious food. That's my tteokbokki and thank you for watching. you
